title: Downward Spiral
description: 2x descending interval sets: 2min→15s with equal work:rest
purpose: VO2max with progressively shorter, harder efforts

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 70%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/16. 70% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 70% for 10:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 70% for 10:00. Finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/16. Fresh legs lie to you — they say this is easy. By rep 3 you'll know the truth.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1: 108% for 2:00. Breathing will be labored by minute 2. That's normal.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Beginning strong. 2:00 at 108%. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting fresh. Your body thinks this is fun. We'll check back in 2:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Starting. 108% for 2:00. Controlled aggression. Lock in form early.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 2:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/16. 55% FTP, Seated. 2:00. Maintain smooth power output.

coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/16. You're 21% through. The pain hasn't peaked yet. Save nothing.

coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 2/16. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/16. Fun fact: this is the exact power output where regret lives.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 2: 110% for 1:45. Execute each rep with precision.

coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 3/16. You're building something real here. 13 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 3/16. The suffering is progressive, like a tax bracket.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 3/16. 112%, 85-90 rpm. This is where your aerobic ceiling gets raised.
